description: Detects XXE risks and format string injection in Python: XML parsing with ET.fromstring/ET.parse/etree.parse, and variable.format() calls. Simplified from Rust: flags all attribute calls (cannot distinguish XML parse methods from safe calls, cannot verify dynamic input, cannot verify .format() is on an identifier vs string literal). All attribute calls flagged.

flag.message: Attribute call detected -- verify this is not XML parsing with untrusted input (ET.fromstring, ET.parse, etree.parse) or variable.format() with user-controlled template
